title: Janmashtami Festival 2026
description: Celebrate the divine appearance day of Lord Krishna with midnight abhishek, kirtan, drama, and prasad distribution.

title: Mayapur Youth Camp
description: A 5-day spiritual youth retreat with morning programs, spiritual classes, debates, dramas and pilgrimage.

title: Sringeri Mahaprasad
description: Monthly Mahaprasad distribution program with kirtan, Gita class and a grand feast for devotees.

title: Bhagavad Gita Weekend Course
description: A 2-day intensive Bhagavad Gita study course with H.G. Radhavallabh Das. Focus on practical application.

title: Radhashtami Celebration
description: Grand celebration of Srimati Radharani's appearance day with flower offerings, kirtan, and drama.
